question: What is the dominant feature of the image? Select from the following options: (A) A sunset over a body of water with palm trees. (B) A beach with palm trees and people. (C) A full moon at night over a lake. (D) A blue sky with clouds and a palm tree on grass.
gold_answer: A sunset over a body of water with palm trees
answer_choices: A sunset over a body of water with palm trees
A beach with palm trees and people
A full moon at night over a lake
A blue sky with clouds and a palm tree on grass
